name: Please Classmate
overview: The story tells of two groups of youths who are at odds with one another, who must work together to merge the two factions together. Chaos arises when the leader of the Northern faction Ming Ze Yu, and the leader of the Southern faction Yi Zheng He become classmates in the same class.

trailers.title: Please Classmate | Trailer | Their senior year is incredible! | 拜托了班长 | ENG SUB
Please Classmate | Trailer | Welcome to a world of the most peaceful rivals in love! |拜托了班长| ENG SUB
